outlook.summary: The spot price is perfectly pinned at the Monthly Gamma Flip and 0DTE Max Pain (694.0-694.11), creating a massive structural magnet. While negative 0DTE GEX amplifies intraday volatility, positive Weekly GEX stabilizes the broader trend. A hard ceiling is established at 700 by dominant Monthly Call OI, with structural support concentrated at 691.
